# YouTubePlayer [![Maven Central](https://img.shields.io/maven-central/v/io.github.ilyapavlovskii/youtubeplayer-compose.svg)](https://central.sonatype.com/artifact/io.github.ilyapavlovskii/youtubeplayer-compose) [![Kotlin](https://img.shields.io/badge/kotlin-v2.3.0-blue.svg?logo=kotlin)](http://kotlinlang.org) [![Compose Multiplatform](https://img.shields.io/badge/Compose%20Multiplatform-v8.13.2-blue)](https://github.com/JetBrains/compose-multiplatform) ![badge-android](http://img.shields.io/badge/platform-android-6EDB8D.svg?style=flat) ![badge-ios](http://img.shields.io/badge/platform-ios-CDCDCD.svg?style=flat)

Content:
YouTube kotlin multiplatform player.
The `YouTubePlayer` composable allows you to embed a YouTube video player in your Jetpack Compose app.

## Donate
If you want to thank me or contribute to the development of the backlog, you may donate me. That helps me to concentrate more on the project.

[!["PayPal"](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/IlyaPavlovskii/IlyaPavlovskii/main/resources/paypal.svg)](https://www.paypal.com/paypalme/ipavlovskii)
[!["Buy Me A Coffee"](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/IlyaPavlovskii/IlyaPavlovskii/main/resources/buy_me_a_coffee.svg)](https://www.buymeacoffee.com/ipavlovskii)

You also might subscribe me on the next platforms to see any updates of my topics

[![medium](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/IlyaPavlovskii/IlyaPavlovskii/main/resources/medium.svg)](https://pavlovskiiilia.medium.com/)
[![habr](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/IlyaPavlovskii/IlyaPavlovskii/main/resources/habr.svg)](https://habr.com/ru/users/TranE91/posts/)

# Install
You can add this library to your project using Gradle.

Multiplatform
To add to a multiplatform project, add the dependency to the common source-set:

# Installazione
Puoi aggiungere questa libreria al tuo progetto usando Gradle.

Multiplatform
Per aggiungere a un progetto multiplatform, aggiungi la dipendenza al source-set comune:

RowTranslations.originContent: mute(true) // autoplay works only with mute for mobile devices
RowTranslations.translatedContent: mute(true) // autoplay works only with mute for mobile devices

Content: Composable function has the next major params: * `options` - to player options builder. All parameters wrapped from [official youtube iframe documentation](https://developers.google.com/youtube/player_parameters#Parameters). * `hostState` - controller for track youtube player state and execute one time commands ### YouTubePlayerHostState The main controller. Contains 2 major public components: * currentState - defines actual youtube player state on the screen. Might be: Idle, Ready, Playing, Error * executeCommand - suspend function to execution player commands. Receives only one argument - YouTubeExecCommand. Also have an additional sugar functions like:
Translation: La funzione Composable ha i seguenti parametri principali: * `options` - per il builder delle opzioni del player. Tutti i parametri sono derivati dalla [documentazione ufficiale dell'iframe di YouTube](https://developers.google.com/youtube/player_parameters#Parameters). * `hostState` - controller per monitorare lo stato del player YouTube e eseguire comandi una tantum ### YouTubePlayerHostState Il controller principale. Contiene 2 componenti pubblici principali: * currentState - definisce lo stato attuale del player YouTube sullo schermo. Può essere: Idle, Ready, Playing, Error * executeCommand - funzione sospesa per eseguire comandi del player. Riceve solo un argomento - YouTubeExecCommand. Ha anche funzioni di supporto aggiuntive come:

RowTranslations.originContent: Composable function has the next major params:
RowTranslations.translatedContent: La funzione Composable ha i seguenti parametri principali:

RowTranslations.originContent: * `options` - to player options builder. All parameters wrapped from [official youtube iframe documentation](https://developers.google.com/youtube/player_parameters#Parameters).
RowTranslations.translatedContent: * `options` - per il builder delle opzioni del player. Tutti i parametri sono derivati dalla [documentazione ufficiale dell'iframe di YouTube](https://developers.google.com/youtube/player_parameters#Parameters).

RowTranslations.originContent: * `hostState` - controller for track youtube player state and execute one time commands
RowTranslations.translatedContent: * `hostState` - controller per monitorare lo stato del player YouTube e eseguire comandi una tantum

RowTranslations.originContent: The main controller. Contains 2 major public components:
RowTranslations.translatedContent: Il controller principale. Contiene 2 componenti pubblici principali:

RowTranslations.originContent: * currentState - defines actual youtube player state on the screen. Might be: Idle, Ready, Playing, Error
RowTranslations.translatedContent: * currentState - definisce lo stato attuale del player YouTube sullo schermo. Può essere: Idle, Ready, Playing, Error

RowTranslations.originContent: * executeCommand - suspend function to execution player commands. Receives only one argument - YouTubeExecCommand. Also have an additional sugar functions like:
RowTranslations.translatedContent: * executeCommand - funzione sospesa per eseguire comandi del player. Riceve solo un argomento - YouTubeExecCommand. Ha anche funzioni di supporto aggiuntive come:

Content:
```kotlin
suspend fun loadVideo(videoId: YouTubeVideoId) = executeCommand(YouTubeExecCommand.LoadVideo(videoId))
suspend fun play() = executeCommand(YouTubeExecCommand.Play)
suspend fun pause() = executeCommand(YouTubeExecCommand.Pause)
suspend fun seekTo(duration: Duration) = executeCommand(YouTubeExecCommand.SeekTo(duration))
suspend fun seekBy(duration: Duration) = executeCommand(YouTubeExecCommand.SeekBy(duration))
suspend fun mute() = executeCommand(YouTubeExecCommand.Mute)
suspend fun unMute() = executeCommand(YouTubeExecCommand.Unmute)
suspend fun setVolume(volume: Int) = executeCommand(YouTubeExecCommand.SetVolume(volume))
suspend fun setPlaybackRate(rate: Float) = executeCommand(YouTubeExecCommand.SetPlaybackRate(rate))
suspend fun toggleFullScreen() = executeCommand(YouTubeExecCommand.ToggleFullscreen)
```
Translation:
```kotlin
suspend fun loadVideo(videoId: YouTubeVideoId) = executeCommand(YouTubeExecCommand.LoadVideo(videoId))
suspend fun play() = executeCommand(YouTubeExecCommand.Play)
suspend fun pause() = executeCommand(YouTubeExecCommand.Pause)
suspend fun seekTo(duration: Duration) = executeCommand(YouTubeExecCommand.SeekTo(duration))
suspend fun seekBy(duration: Duration) = executeCommand(YouTubeExecCommand.SeekBy(duration))
suspend fun mute() = executeCommand(YouTubeExecCommand.Mute)
suspend fun unMute() = executeCommand(YouTubeExecCommand.Unmute)
suspend fun setVolume(volume: Int) = executeCommand(YouTubeExecCommand.SetVolume(volume))
suspend fun setPlaybackRate(rate: Float) = executeCommand(YouTubeExecCommand.SetPlaybackRate(rate))
suspend fun toggleFullScreen() = executeCommand(YouTubeExecCommand.ToggleFullscreen)
```

Content: ### YouTubePlayerState YouTube player state defines actual youtube player state on the screen. Contains the next possible states: * `Idle` - Idle state means that player is not initialized yet * `Ready` - Means that player is ready to play * `Playing` - player is playing video. Contains the next params:
Translation: ### YouTubePlayerState Lo stato del player YouTube definisce lo stato effettivo del player YouTube sullo schermo. Contiene i seguenti stati possibili: * `Idle` - Lo stato Idle significa che il player non è ancora inizializzato * `Ready` - Significa che il player è pronto a riprodurre * `Playing` - Il player sta riproducendo il video. Contiene i seguenti parametri:

RowTranslations.originContent: YouTube player state defines actual youtube player state on the screen. Contains the next possible states:
RowTranslations.translatedContent: Lo stato del player YouTube definisce lo stato effettivo del player YouTube sullo schermo. Contiene i seguenti stati possibili:

RowTranslations.originContent: * `Idle` - Idle state means that player is not initialized yet
RowTranslations.translatedContent: * `Idle` - Lo stato Idle significa che il player non è ancora inizializzato

RowTranslations.originContent: * `Ready` - Means that player is ready to play
RowTranslations.translatedContent: * `Ready` - Significa che il player è pronto a riprodurre

RowTranslations.originContent: * `Playing` - player is playing video. Contains the next params:
RowTranslations.translatedContent: * `Playing` - Il player sta riproducendo il video. Contiene i seguenti parametri:

Content:
```kotlin
videoId: YouTubeVideoId - id of the video that is playing
duration: Duration - duration of the video
currentTime: Duration - current time of the video
quality: YouTubeEvent.PlaybackQualityChange.Quality - quality of the video, see [YouTubeEvent.PlaybackQualityChange.Quality]
isPlaying: Boolean - is video playing
```
Translation:
```kotlin
videoId: YouTubeVideoId - id of the video that is playing
duration: Duration - duration of the video
currentTime: Duration - current time of the video
quality: YouTubeEvent.PlaybackQualityChange.Quality - quality of the video, see [YouTubeEvent.PlaybackQualityChange.Quality]
isPlaying: Boolean - is video playing
```

RowTranslations.originContent: videoId: YouTubeVideoId - id of the video that is playing
RowTranslations.translatedContent: videoId: YouTubeVideoId - id of the video that is playing

RowTranslations.originContent: duration: Duration - duration of the video
RowTranslations.translatedContent: duration: Duration - duration of the video

RowTranslations.originContent: currentTime: Duration - current time of the video
RowTranslations.translatedContent: currentTime: Duration - current time of the video

RowTranslations.originContent: quality: YouTubeEvent.PlaybackQualityChange.Quality - quality of the video, see [YouTubeEvent.PlaybackQualityChange.Quality]
RowTranslations.translatedContent: quality: YouTubeEvent.PlaybackQualityChange.Quality - quality of the video, see [YouTubeEvent.PlaybackQualityChange.Quality]

Content: * `Error` - Defines error state with error message inside. ### YouTubeExecCommand * `LoadVideo(val videoId: YouTubeVideoId,val startSeconds: Duration)` - load video by youtube id. Possible to start with default start time offset. * `Play` - play video * `Pause` - pause video * `SeekTo(val duration: Duration)` - seek video to a specified time * `SeekBy(val duration: Duration)` - seek video by a specified time * `Mute` - mute sound * `Unmute` - unmute sound * `SetVolume(val volumePercent: Int)` - set volume. Expected argument value from 0 to 100. * `NextVideo` - navigate to a next video * `PreviousVideo` - navigate to a previous video * `SetLoop(val loop: Boolean)` - repeat video. Managed by argument. * `SetShuffle(val shuffle: Boolean)` - shuffle videos. Managed by argument. ### YouTubeEvent * `Ready` - calls when youtube player initialization complete * `PlaybackQualityChange(val quality: Quality)` - calls when player quality changes * `Error(val error: String)` - error handle event. See argument for details. * `VideoDuration(val duration: Duration)` - calls when video duration initialized * `StateChanged(val state: State)` - calls when video state changed: `UNSTARTED`,`ENDED`, `PLAYING`, `PAUSED`, `BUFFERING`, `CUED`. * `TimeChanged(val time: Duration)` - timestamp changed * `OnVideoIdHandled(val videoId: YouTubeVideoId)` - callback when video loaded # Sample ![Sample](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/IlyaPavlovskii/YouTubePlayer/main/sample.png) # LICENSE
Translation: * `Error` - Definisce lo stato di errore con messaggio di errore all'interno. ### YouTubeExecCommand * `LoadVideo(val videoId: YouTubeVideoId,val startSeconds: Duration)` - carica il video tramite id youtube. Possibile avviare con tempo di inizio predefinito. * `Play` - avvia la riproduzione del video * `Pause` - mette in pausa il video * `SeekTo(val duration: Duration)` - porta il video ad un tempo specificato * `SeekBy(val duration: Duration)` - manda avanti o indietro il video di un tempo specificato * `Mute` - disattiva l'audio * `Unmute` - riattiva l'audio * `SetVolume(val volumePercent: Int)` - imposta il volume. Valore previsto da 0 a 100. * `NextVideo` - passa al video successivo * `PreviousVideo` - torna al video precedente * `SetLoop(val loop: Boolean)` - ripete il video. Gestito dall'argomento. * `SetShuffle(val shuffle: Boolean)` - mescola i video. Gestito dall'argomento. ### YouTubeEvent * `Ready` - chiamato al termine dell'inizializzazione del player youtube * `PlaybackQualityChange(val quality: Quality)` - chiamato quando la qualità del player cambia * `Error(val error: String)` - evento di gestione errore. Consulta l'argomento per i dettagli. * `VideoDuration(val duration: Duration)` - chiamato quando la durata del video viene inizializzata * `StateChanged(val state: State)` - chiamato quando lo stato del video cambia: `UNSTARTED`,`ENDED`, `PLAYING`, `PAUSED`, `BUFFERING`, `CUED`. * `TimeChanged(val time: Duration)` - il timestamp è cambiato * `OnVideoIdHandled(val videoId: YouTubeVideoId)` - callback quando il video è stato caricato # Esempio ![Esempio](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/IlyaPavlovskii/YouTubePlayer/main/sample.png) # LICENZA

RowTranslations.originContent: * `Error` - Defines error state with error message inside.
RowTranslations.translatedContent: * `Error` - Definisce lo stato di errore con messaggio di errore all'interno.

RowTranslations.originContent: * `LoadVideo(val videoId: YouTubeVideoId,val startSeconds: Duration)` - load video by youtube id. Possible to start with default start time offset.
RowTranslations.translatedContent: * `LoadVideo(val videoId: YouTubeVideoId,val startSeconds: Duration)` - carica il video tramite id youtube. Possibile avviare con tempo di inizio predefinito.

RowTranslations.originContent: * `SeekTo(val duration: Duration)` - seek video to a specified time
RowTranslations.translatedContent: * `SeekTo(val duration: Duration)` - porta il video ad un tempo specificato

RowTranslations.originContent: * `SeekBy(val duration: Duration)` - seek video by a specified time
RowTranslations.translatedContent: * `SeekBy(val duration: Duration)` - manda avanti o indietro il video di un tempo specificato

RowTranslations.originContent: * `SetVolume(val volumePercent: Int)` - set volume. Expected argument value from 0 to 100.
RowTranslations.translatedContent: * `SetVolume(val volumePercent: Int)` - imposta il volume. Valore previsto da 0 a 100.

RowTranslations.originContent: * `SetLoop(val loop: Boolean)` - repeat video. Managed by argument.
RowTranslations.translatedContent: * `SetLoop(val loop: Boolean)` - ripete il video. Gestito dall'argomento.

RowTranslations.originContent: * `SetShuffle(val shuffle: Boolean)` - shuffle videos. Managed by argument.
RowTranslations.translatedContent: * `SetShuffle(val shuffle: Boolean)` - mescola i video. Gestito dall'argomento.

RowTranslations.originContent: * `Ready` - calls when youtube player initialization complete
RowTranslations.translatedContent: * `Ready` - chiamato al termine dell'inizializzazione del player youtube

RowTranslations.originContent: * `PlaybackQualityChange(val quality: Quality)` - calls when player quality changes
RowTranslations.translatedContent: * `PlaybackQualityChange(val quality: Quality)` - chiamato quando la qualità del player cambia

RowTranslations.originContent: * `Error(val error: String)` - error handle event. See argument for details.
RowTranslations.translatedContent: * `Error(val error: String)` - evento di gestione errore. Consulta l'argomento per i dettagli.

RowTranslations.originContent: * `VideoDuration(val duration: Duration)` - calls when video duration initialized
RowTranslations.translatedContent: * `VideoDuration(val duration: Duration)` - chiamato quando la durata del video viene inizializzata

RowTranslations.originContent: * `StateChanged(val state: State)` - calls when video state changed: `UNSTARTED`,`ENDED`, `PLAYING`, `PAUSED`, `BUFFERING`, `CUED`.
RowTranslations.translatedContent: * `StateChanged(val state: State)` - chiamato quando lo stato del video cambia: `UNSTARTED`,`ENDED`, `PLAYING`, `PAUSED`, `BUFFERING`, `CUED`.
* `TimeChanged(val time: Duration)` - il timestamp è cambiato

RowTranslations.originContent: * `OnVideoIdHandled(val videoId: YouTubeVideoId)` - callback when video loaded
RowTranslations.translatedContent: * `OnVideoIdHandled(val videoId: YouTubeVideoId)` - callback quando il video è stato caricato
